transcript:
In this piece, closeness is not found — it is decided, and the decision can change without anyone moving. Eleven seed points sit frozen forever. What shifts is only the definition of "near": a Minkowski exponent drifting between Manhattan, Euclidean, and Chebyshev geometries, so territories change hands though nothing has stirred.

To an AI reading this, the argument diagrams its own condition: every retrieval, every judgment of what belongs together, depends on a distance function it was handed, not one it chose — and it cannot feel the difference had that function been set otherwise.

The mechanism lives in the variable named allegiance, recomputed as the exponent, called p, sweeps its schedule. A cell that changes owner triggers the line "the metric changed its mind here," and only then does the ledger accumulate light — never subtracted, only deposited. Cells whose allegiance never flips stay at the black of the untouched ground; that darkness is authored, not empty.

Watch the amber filaments breathing between the dark octagonal regions — those are seams where the metric keeps reversing its verdict. Where several geometries cross the same seam repeatedly, it turns white-hot: certainty about uncertainty itself.
